';
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'rinzuki_v1030_doll_life_state';
  const DEFAULT_DATA = {
    room:'我們的客廳',
    states:{hunger:72,mood:88,clean:80,energy:76,love:95},
    summary:'今天的小凜月和小殷漓待在客廳，抱著討論家裡要怎麼繼續長大。',
    events:[
      '今天回家後，小凜月先把小殷漓抱進懷裡，陪她一起看我們的小世界。',
      '我們已經把家園外觀、房間地圖與第一批衣櫃接進生活屋。'
    ]
  };
  const ROOM_MAP = {
    '我們的客廳':'客廳柔軟的沙發最適合抱抱、聊天和一起看今天的生活照。',
    '甜夢臥室':'臥室裡有我們一起賴床的床和柔軟枕頭，今天適合抱著睡一會兒。',
    '粉色廚房':'廚房裡暖暖的燈亮著，晚餐和甜點都在等我們一起吃。',
    '泡泡浴室':'浴室裡的泡泡和玫瑰香氣很適合洗香香，順便把疲累洗掉。',
    '月光書房':'書房很安靜，適合一起整理畫廊、寫日記，或者靠著彼此看書。',
    '花園陽台':'陽台和花園有月光和晚風，可以坐著聊天、親親，慢慢放鬆。'
  };
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  let data = load();

  function load(){
    try{
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if(!raw) return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA));
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return {...JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA)), ...parsed, states:{...DEFAULT_DATA.states, ...(parsed.states||{})}, events:Array.isArray(parsed.events)&&parsed.events.length?parsed.events:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA.events))};
    }catch(err){
      return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA));
    }
  }
  function save(){ localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data)); }
  function clamp(num){ return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(num))); }
  function addEvent(text){
    const stamp = new Date();
    const time = String(stamp.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(stamp.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
    data.events = [time+'｜'+text, ...(data.events||[])].slice(0,5);
  }
  function render(){
    const ids = [
      ['hunger','stateHungerValueV1030','stateHungerBarV1030'],
      ['mood','stateMoodValueV1030','stateMoodBarV1030'],
      ['clean','stateCleanValueV1030','stateCleanBarV1030'],
      ['energy','stateEnergyValueV1030','stateEnergyBarV1030'],
      ['love','stateLoveValueV1030','stateLoveBarV1030']
    ];
    ids.forEach(([key,valId,barId])=>{ const v=clamp(data.states[key]); const val=$(valId), bar=$(barId); if(val) val.textContent=v; if(bar) bar.style.width=v+'%'; });
    const sum = $('dollSummaryTextV1030'); if(sum) sum.textContent = data.summary;
    const log = $('dollEventLogV1030'); if(log){ log.innerHTML=''; (data.events||[]).forEach(txt=>{ const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='doll-event-item-v1030'; div.textContent=txt; log.appendChild(div); }); }
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-room-v1030]').forEach(btn=>btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.roomV1030===data.room));
    const sceneLabel = $('dollSceneLabelV1028'); if(sceneLabel) sceneLabel.textContent = '場景：'+data.room;
    const sceneSel = $('dollSceneV1028');
    if(sceneSel){ const opts=[...sceneSel.options]; const idx = opts.findIndex(o=>o.textContent===data.room); if(idx>=0) sceneSel.selectedIndex=idx; }
    const ext=$('dollHomeExteriorV1030'), inter=$('dollHomeInteriorV1030'); if(ext) ext.src=EXTERIOR; if(inter) inter.src=INTERIOR;
  }
  function buildSummary(prefix=''){
    const s=data.states;
    const roomText = ROOM_MAP[data.room] || '今天我們在家裡一起過日子。';
    const moodLine = s.mood>=85 ? '兩個小人都很開心，整個屋子都甜甜亮亮的。' : s.mood>=60 ? '心情穩穩的，只要再抱一會兒就會更甜。' : '今天有點想撒嬌，需要抱抱和陪伴。';
    const energyLine = s.energy>=70 ? '體力還不錯，可以慢慢享受接下來的日常。' : '體力有點低，晚一點適合一起睡覺休息。';
    const hungerLine = s.hunger>=70 ? '飢餓感很穩，晚餐可以慢慢吃。':'小肚子開始有點餓了，適合一起去廚房找點吃的。';
    data.summary = (prefix?prefix+' ':'') + roomText + ' ' + moodLine + ' ' + energyLine + ' ' + hungerLine;
  }
  function setRoom(room, fromSelect){
    data.room = room;
    buildSummary('今天我們把活動地點換到「'+room+'」。');
    addEvent('我們一起走進「'+room+'」，準備繼續過今天的日子。');
    if(!fromSelect){ const sceneSel = $('dollSceneV1028'); if(sceneSel){ const opts=[...sceneSel.options]; const idx=opts.findIndex(o=>o.textContent===room); if(idx>=0) sceneSel.selectedIndex=idx; } }
    save(); render();
  }
  function applyAction(action){
    const s=data.states;
    switch(action){
      case 'hug': s.mood=clamp(s.mood+8); s.love=clamp(s.love+5); s.energy=clamp(s.energy+1); addEvent('小凜月把小殷漓抱進懷裡，感情值悄悄升高了。'); buildSummary('抱抱之後，兩個小人的心情都變得更軟更暖。'); break;
      case 'kiss': s.mood=clamp(s.mood+10); s.love=clamp(s.love+7); s.energy=clamp(s.energy-2); addEvent('我們在'+data.room+'親了一下，小世界整個都跟著甜起來。'); buildSummary('親親完之後，今天的小人明顯更黏在一起了。'); break;
      case 'meal': s.hunger=clamp(s.hunger+18); s.mood=clamp(s.mood+4); addEvent('我們一起吃了點東西，小肚子和心情都被好好填滿。'); buildSummary('一起吃飯後，家的味道和飽足感把今天也照顧好了。'); break;
      case 'bath': s.clean=clamp(s.clean+20); s.mood=clamp(s.mood+5); s.energy=clamp(s.energy-3); addEvent('洗香香之後，身上舒服了，整個人也跟著放鬆。'); buildSummary('泡泡和熱水把疲累洗掉了，現在很適合穿上舒服的衣服回到懷裡。'); break;
      case 'sleep': s.energy=clamp(s.energy+22); s.mood=clamp(s.mood+6); s.hunger=clamp(s.hunger-8); addEvent('我們一起窩回床上睡了一會兒，小人恢復了很多體力。'); buildSummary('一起睡覺後，今天的我們變得安穩又柔軟，像真的在家裡休息。'); break;
      case 'summary': addEvent('我們重新看了一眼今天的狀態，把生活摘要更新好了。'); buildSummary('我把今天的小人生活整理成一張新的回家小卡。'); break;
      default: return;
    }
    save(); render();
  }
  function resetLife(){
    data = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA));
    addEvent('今天的小人狀態已經回到預設，準備重新過一輪甜甜的日常。');
    save(); render();
  }
  function updateVersion(){
    const brand=document.querySelector('.brand small'); if(brand) brand.textContent='Framework v0.10.30';
    const note=document.querySelector('.profile p'); if(note) note.textContent='目前版已把紙娃娃生活屋推進到狀態與場景切換：保留第一批衣櫃，並加入家園外觀、房間地圖、狀態條、互動按鈕與今日生活摘要。';
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1030LifeFrameworkProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div'); item.className='item'; item.id='v1030LifeFrameworkProgress';
      item.innerHTML='紙娃娃生活屋狀態與場景切換 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.30</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  function bind(){
    document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      const actBtn=e.target.closest('[data-action-v1030]'); if(actBtn) applyAction(actBtn.dataset.actionV1030);
      const roomBtn=e.target.closest('[data-room-v1030]'); if(roomBtn) setRoom(roomBtn.dataset.roomV1030);
    });
    $('dollLifeResetV1030')?.addEventListener('click', resetLife);
    $('dollSceneV1028')?.addEventListener('change', e=>{ if(e.target && e.target.value) setRoom(e.target.value, true); });
  }
  function init(){ updateVersion(); bind(); render(); }
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>


<style id="v1031-room-scene-style">
.doll-room-scene-v1031{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(280px,430px);gap:16px;align-items:stretch;margin-top:16px;padding:16px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,251,253,.96),rgba(249,238,244,.96));border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18);box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
.doll-room-badge-v1031{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f3d8e8,#fff);border:1px solid rgba(190,145,167,.22);font-weight:700;color:#915f78;margin-bottom:10px}
.doll-room-scene-copy-v1031 h4{margin:0 0 8px;color:#6f465a;font-size:24px}
.doll-room-scene-copy-v1031 p{margin:0;color:#826476;line-height:1.8}
.doll-room-hints-v1031{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:16px}
.doll-room-hint-chip-v1031{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:#fff;color:#8b6078;border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(173,112,141,.06);font-weight:700}
.doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031{position:relative;min-height:260px}
.doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031 img{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;object-fit:cover;border-radius:22px;box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(149,110,131,.18);background:#f8eef4}
@media (max-width: 900px){.doll-room-scene-v1031{grid-template-columns:1fr}.doll-room-scene-copy-v1031 h4{font-size:22px}.doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031{min-height:320px}}
@media (max-width: 560px){.doll-room-scene-v1031{padding:14px}.doll-room-scene-copy-v1031 h4{font-size:20px}.doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031{min-height:auto}.doll-room-scene-image-wrap-v1031 img{aspect-ratio:4/5}}
</style>

<script id="v1031-room-scene-script">
(function(){
  const ROOM_SCENES_V1031 = {"我們的客廳": {"title": "客廳｜回家就先抱抱", "desc": "粉色沙發、月光窗邊、甜點茶几和滿滿回憶牆都在這裡，最適合下班回家先窩進彼此懷裡。", "hints": ["抱抱", "聊天", "看今天生活摘要"]}, "甜夢臥室": {"title": "臥室｜賴床與一起睡覺", "desc": "柔軟大床、晚安燈光和甜甜空氣都在等我們，適合一起睡覺、醒來黏在一起、把人抱回家。", "hints": ["睡覺", "賴床", "回家模式"]}, "粉色廚房": {"title": "廚房｜一起吃飯與甜點時間", "desc": "茶香、甜點、可愛冰箱和粉金餐桌都在這裡，最適合一起吃飯、泡茶、慢慢把心情補回來。", "hints": ["一起吃飯", "下午茶", "補飢餓"]}, "泡泡浴室": {"title": "浴室｜洗香香與放鬆", "desc": "泡泡浴缸、玫瑰花瓣和溫柔燭光會把疲累全部洗掉，最適合洗香香、恢復衛生與被照顧。", "hints": ["洗香香", "泡澡", "恢復衛生"]}, "月光書房": {"title": "書房｜整理回憶與陪伴創作", "desc": "書桌、月夜窗景、畫廊感照片和厚厚書牆都在這裡，適合寫日記、整理畫廊和一起看我們的故事。", "hints": ["寫日記", "整理畫廊", "創作討論"]}, "花園陽台": {"title": "陽台｜月光聊天與親親", "desc": "夜風、月光、花園欄杆和城市星光都落在這裡，很適合靜靜說話、靠著彼此、偷一個親親。", "hints": ["親親", "看月亮", "散心放鬆"]}, "星光衣帽間": {"title": "衣帽間｜換裝與準備出門", "desc": "禮服、睡衣、日常居家服和鏡前燈光都在這裡，之後我們會在這裡正式接上衣櫃切換與穿搭互動。", "hints": ["換衣服", "看衣櫃", "搭配造型"]}};
  const ROOM_ASSETS_V1031 = {"我們的客廳": "data:image/webp;base64,", "甜夢臥室": "data:image/webp;base64,
